intro: OpenAI has confidentially filed for an initial public offering with the SEC, joining rival Anthropic in pursuing a Wall Street debut as major AI companies move toward public markets. The filing comes as OpenAI plans to spend approximately $600 billion on AI infrastructure through 2030. Separately, Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model with built-in safeguards limiting access to sensitive capabilities like cybersecurity vulnerability discovery.
